channel.title: Home on My Curious Site
channel.description: Recent content in Home on My Curious Site

item.title: Example Project
item.description: Describe your project here. You can use full Markdown.

item.title: Getting Started
item.description:
Installation

See the theme README for full installation instructions.

Configuration

Edit hugo.toml to configure colors, layout, and content sections.

item.title: Welcome to kyrie
item.description:
This is your first blog post. Edit or delete it and start writing your own content.

Getting Started

kyrie supports Markdown, raw HTML, and all standard Hugo features.

Features

  • Bilingual (multilingual-ready)
  • Blog, Docs, and Projects sections
  • Light / Dark / Auto color mode
  • 7 color schemes
  • Responsive layout

item.title: About
item.description: This is the about page. Tell visitors who you are and what your site is about.
